---
title: "About"
format: html
---

```{=html}
<div class="about-section">
  <p>
    Here you can find information about the purpose of this project, the technologies used, and the thought process behind our work. 
  </p>
  <p>
    In this website, we discuss more about the project and our thought process. Through the provided data, we have come up with some interesting insights and conclusions.
  </p>
  <p>
    Here is our GitHub repository:
    <a href="https://github.com/gejunchim2024/IS428-Visual-Business-Project" target="_blank">GitHub Repository ↗</a>
  </p>
    <p>
    Here are our meeting minutes:
    <a href="https://docs.google.com/document/d/1xej3K1JF8_EaUuOrIMHehdVn2s-P2RjW2IG2qZvWgZc/edit?usp=sharing" target="_blank">Meeting Minutes ↗</a>
  </p>
  <p><strong>Authors:</strong></p>
  <ul>
    <li>Riona Ng</li>
    <li>Chim Ge Jun</li>
  </ul>
</div>

<h2 class="team-section-title">The Team</h2>

<div class="team-container">
  <div class="team-member">
    <img src="images/riona.JPG" alt="Riona Ng" />
    <h3>Riona Ng</h3>
    <p>Year 2 School of Computing and Information Systems student</p>
  </div>

  <div class="team-member">
    <img src="images/gejun.JPG" alt="Chim Ge Jun" />
    <h3>Chim Ge Jun</h3>
    <p>Year 2 School of Computing and Information Systems student</p>
  </div>
</div>
```
